div.div:
1. Renderer invokes typed preload APIs.
2. Main process forwards JSON-RPC to the CLI child over stdin/stdout.
3. CLI streams notifications back for text chunks, tool calls, completion, and errors.
4. Main process also handles platform-only actions such as file pickers and app updates.
